section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports swelling in their ankles.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the history rather than in objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: Hemoglobin a1c has been running a little bit high.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an interpretive summary of a lab trend (high A1c) that functions more as part of the diagnostic assessment than as a discrete exam or lab result.
This is a patient-reported symptom and should be documented in the history rather than in objective findings.
